name: Replicate HTTP API
description: Replicate HTTP API provides a REST API for programmatic access to its features. Use it to automate workflows and integrate with other services.

capabilities.name: account
capabilities.description: Manage account — get the authenticated account. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: collections
capabilities.description: Manage collections — list collections of models, get a collection of models. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: deployments
capabilities.description: Manage deployments — create a deployment, create a prediction using a deployment, list deployments. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: files
capabilities.description: Manage files — create a file, list files, get a file. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: hardware
capabilities.description: Manage hardware — list available hardware for models. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: models
capabilities.description: Manage models — create a model, create a prediction using an official model, create a training. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: predictions
capabilities.description: Manage predictions — create a prediction, cancel a prediction, list predictions. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: search
capabilities.description: Manage search — search models, collections, and docs (beta). Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: trainings
capabilities.description: Manage trainings — cancel a training, list trainings, get a training. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: webhooks
capabilities.description: Manage webhooks — get the signing secret for the default webhook. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
